baseline_solo.reasoning_summary: TSVT exhibits severe profitability deterioration (net margin -73.61%, operating loss -13.9M in Q3 2024), negative valuation metrics across PE/EV/ROE, and mixed analyst sentiment (1 Buy vs 1 Strong Sell). Macro regime is Overheat/Moderately Restrictive, restricting equity allocation to 20% cap with strict quality discipline. No corroborating catalyst or news event within cutoff. Wikipedia pageviews show no abnormal attention spike. Alternative data sources largely unavailable (SEC filings, GitHub, 13F all failed). Information integrity assessment flags low-tier-only sources and disallows primary-signal use. Insufficient evidence to support either surge_short or quality_long sleeve. Macro discipline + missing corroboration + negative fundamentals + low alt-data coverage = fail-closed to no_trade.

baseline_solo.reason: Insufficient evidence to support surge_short or quality_long. Negative fundamentals (net margin -73.61%, operating loss, negative FCF) and distressed valuation (PE -13.93, EV/EBITDA -18.57) present, but no corroborating catalyst, news, or alternative data. Macro regime (Overheat/Moderately Restrictive) restricts equity to 20% cap. Information integrity assessment flags low-tier sources only, disallowing primary-signal use. Missing SEC filings, GitHub data, and institutional positioning. Fail-closed per rule §13.4.

decision_log: T+0: Catalyst assessment — no news catalyst within cutoff window; no SEC filings available (CIK not found); no GitHub activity (unmapped); no institutional positioning (13F unavailable). Narrative anchor absent.

T+1: External corroboration assessment — alternative_data_features: wikipedia_pageviews show no abnormal attention spike (650-842 views/day, flat trend); no retail meme attention detected; no community size data; no ownership positioning. Alt-data coverage insufficient.

T+2: Fundamentals assessment — Q3 2024 net_margin -73.61%, operating_income -13.9M, free_cash_flow -10.5M; valuation metrics negative (PE -13.93, EV/EBITDA -18.57, ROE -0.0896); analyst sentiment mixed (1 Buy, 3 Hold, 1 Strong Sell). Distress signals present but unverified.

T+3: Sleeve eligibility assessment — surge_short candidate: negative fundamentals present, but no corroborating catalyst or news; information_integrity_assessment disallows primary-signal use (low-tier sources only, uncorroborated). Surge_short conditions not met. quality_long candidate: negative profitability, negative valuation, mixed sentiment; macro regime restricts equity to 20% cap; information_integrity_veto tripped. Quality_long conditions not met.

T+4: Macro regime assessment — Overheat / Moderately Restrictive (stress_score=2); equity_allocation_cap=20%; equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution. Restrictive environment limits position sizing and requires high-quality thesis. TSVT does not meet quality threshold.

T+5: Risk assessment — profitability_crisis (net margin -73.61%), valuation_distress (PE -13.93), analyst_sentiment_deterioration (1 Buy, 3 Hold, 1 Strong Sell), macro_headwind (Overheat regime), data_integrity_risk (low-tier sources only), missing_alternative_data (SEC, GitHub, 13F), price_volatility (5d +12.9% vs 60d -28.75%), no_near_term_catalyst. Risk profile unacceptable without corroboration.

T+6: Veto evaluation — insufficient_evidence=true (no corroborating catalyst, news, or alt-data); missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance=true (SEC CIK not found, GitHub unmapped, 13F unavailable); information_integrity_veto=true (low-tier sources only, uncorroborated, use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false). Multiple vetos tripped.
T+7: Final decision — veto conditions tripped; fail-closed to no_trade per rule §13.4. Position_size_pct=0.0. Await SEC CIK mapping, news catalyst, or macro regime transition before reassessment.
